# Proverbs 13

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-INDEX (verse table + nav; auto-generated — safe to regenerate) -->

↑ [Proverbs](../README.md)  ·  [‹ Proverbs 12](../Proverbs-12/README.md)  ·  [Proverbs 14 ›](../Proverbs-14/README.md)

## Verses (25)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | A wise son is a lover of teaching, but the ears of the haters of authority are shut to sharp words. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | A man will get good from the fruit of his lips, but the desire of the false is for violent acts. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | He who keeps a watch on his mouth keeps his life; but he whose lips are open wide will have destruction. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | The hater of work does not get his desires, but the soul of the hard workers will be made fat. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | The upright man is a hater of false words: the evil-doer gets a bad name and is put to shame. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Righteousness keeps safe him whose way is without error, but evil-doers are overturned by sin. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | A man may be acting as if he had wealth, but have nothing; another may seem poor, but have great wealth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | A man will give his wealth in exchange for his life; but the poor will not give ear to sharp words. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | There is a glad dawn for the upright man, but the light of the sinner will be put out. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | The only effect of pride is fighting; but wisdom is with the quiet in spirit. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Wealth quickly got will become less; but he who gets a store by the work of his hands will have it increased. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Hope put off is a weariness to the heart; but when what is desired comes, it is a tree of life. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | He who makes sport of the word will come to destruction, but the respecter of the law will be rewarded. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | The teaching of the wise is a fountain of life, turning men away from the nets of death. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Wise behaviour gets approval, but the way of the false is their destruction. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | A sharp man does everything with knowledge, but a foolish man makes clear his foolish thoughts. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | A man taking false news is a cause of trouble, but he who gives news rightly makes things well. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | Need and shame will be the fate of him who is uncontrolled by training; but he who takes note of teaching will be honoured. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | To get one's desire is sweet to the soul, but to give up evil is disgusting to the foolish. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | Go with wise men and be wise: but he who keeps company with the foolish will be broken. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | Evil will overtake sinners, but the upright will be rewarded with good. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | The heritage of the good man is handed down to his children's children; and the wealth of the sinner is stored up for the upright man. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | There is much food in the ploughed land of the poor; but it is taken away by wrongdoing. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | He who keeps back his rod is unkind to his son: the loving father gives punishment with care. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | The upright man has food to the full measure of his desire, but there will be no food for the stomach of evil-doers. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
